technology.title: Nvidia launches ‘superchip’ putting AI power into laptops and PCs
technology.summary: Firm says its RTX Spark PC chip for Microsoft Windows will let AI agents replace the mouse and keyboard Business live – latest updates A new front has opened up in the battle for dominance in AI chips, as Nvidia said its latest development could replace the mouse and keyboard in how people use computers. The $5tn (£3.7tn) US semiconductor company has launched a “superchip” that puts AI capabilities into laptops and desktop computers, a move that will pit it against Intel, Apple, Qualcomm and AMD. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Firm says its RTX Spark PC chip for Microsoft Windows will let AI agents replace the mouse and keyboard Business live – latest updates A new front has opened up in the battle for dominance in AI chips, as Nvidia said its latest development could replace the mouse and keyboard in how people use computers. The $5tn (£3.7tn) US semiconductor company has launched a “superchip” that puts AI capabilities into laptops and desktop computers, a move that will pit it against Intel, Apple, Qualcomm and AMD. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: Nvidia推出了一款名為RTX Spark的超級晶片，旨在將人工智慧功能整合進入筆記型電腦和桌上型電腦，並可能取代傳統的滑鼠和鍵盤操作。這一舉措使Nvidia在AI晶片市場中與Intel、Apple、Qualcomm和AMD等競爭對手展開新的競爭。
briefing.background: 隨著人工智慧技術的快速發展，對於能夠支持AI應用的硬體需求日益增加。Nvidia作為全球領先的半導體公司，長期以來專注於圖形處理單元（GPU）的開發，並逐步擴展其在AI領域的影響力。RTX Spark的推出不僅是對消費者市場的進一步開拓，也顯示出Nvidia在AI晶片競爭中的雄心。多家知名硬體製造商，如Microsoft、Asus、HP、MSI、Lenovo和Dell，已經計劃在今年秋季推出搭載RTX Spark的筆記型電腦，顯示出市場對這一新技術的期待。
briefing.analysis: Nvidia的RTX Spark晶片可能會徹底改變用戶與電腦互動的方式，這對於傳統的輸入設備市場構成挑戰。各大硬體製造商的合作表明，市場對於AI集成的需求正在上升。然而，這也可能引發其他競爭者的反擊，例如Intel和AMD可能會加速其自身AI晶片的開發，以保持市場份額。此外，Nvidia的進一步擴張可能會引發對於市場壟斷的擔憂，特別是在AI技術日益重要的背景下。參考報導中提到的多家合作夥伴的具體計劃，進一步強調了Nvidia在消費者市場的影響力和潛力。

supporting_titles: These are the first Nvidia RTX Spark laptops
supporting_summaries: Nvidia has officially entered the world of consumer laptop chips with the RTX Spark, and several device makers already have hardware lined up for it. Microsoft, Asus, HP, MSI, Lenovo, and Dell are expected to launch RTX Spark laptops sometime this fall, and some of those partner companies have shared details about what we can […]

technology.title: Nvidia, Unitree and Sharpa unite to design humanoid robot that can perform ‘real work’
technology.summary: Nvidia has partnered with Chinese robotics champion Unitree Robotics and Singapore robotic hand maker Sharpa to release a new humanoid robot reference design to accelerate innovation in the global humanoid industry, the US chip giant’s CEO, Jensen Huang, announced on Monday. The new design, called H2+ or Isaac GR00T, will support industry-wide humanoid robotics research by streamlining the full development workflow for developers, including data collection, policy training and real-world...

briefing.news_focus: Nvidia has partnered with Chinese robotics champion Unitree Robotics and Singapore robotic hand maker Sharpa to release a new humanoid robot reference design to accelerate innovation in the global humanoid industry, the US chip giant’s CEO, Jensen Huang, announced on Monday. The new design, called H2+ or Isaac GR00T, will support industry-wide humanoid robotics research by streamlining the full development workflow for developers, including data collection, policy training and real-world...
briefing.news_focus_zh: Nvidia與中國機器人公司Unitree Robotics及新加坡的Sharpa合作，推出一款名為H2+或Isaac GR00T的人形機器人參考設計。此設計旨在加速全球人形機器人產業的創新，並將支持行業內的研究，簡化開發者的整個開發流程，包括數據收集、政策訓練及實際應用等。
briefing.background: 隨著人工智慧與自動化技術的快速發展，人形機器人逐漸成為科技界的焦點。Nvidia作為全球領先的半導體公司，致力於推動AI技術的應用，並在機器人領域尋求擴展。Unitree Robotics在中國市場上以其創新機器人技術聞名，而Sharpa則專注於機器人手部技術的開發。這三家公司聯手，顯示出對於人形機器人市場的重視，並希望透過合作來加速技術進步和商業化。
briefing.analysis: 此次合作標誌著Nvidia在機器人技術領域的戰略擴展，可能會引發行業內其他企業的關注與競爭。Nvidia的技術優勢與Unitree的市場經驗結合，將有助於推動人形機器人的商業應用，特別是在工業和服務領域。各方利益關係中，Nvidia希望透過這一合作進一步鞏固其在AI硬體市場的地位，而Unitree則可能借此機會提升其技術能力及市場影響力。未來，若該設計成功商業化，將可能改變人形機器人的開發模式，並促進相關產業的發展。

technology.title: Beyond Nvidia: how US export curbs are forcing China to redesign its AI chip industry
technology.summary: Under the weight of sustained US export controls on advanced semiconductors, China’s AI chipmakers are battling to forge a self-reliant silicon ecosystem capable of breaking Nvidia’s stranglehold on the market. At the centre of this rivalry is a fundamental design debate: Should the country rely on the versatile graphics processing unit (GPU) or pivot to the highly specialised application-specific integrated circuit (ASIC)? The fight is no longer about finding a single Nvidia clone; it is about...

briefing.news_focus: Under the weight of sustained US export controls on advanced semiconductors, China’s AI chipmakers are battling to forge a self-reliant silicon ecosystem capable of breaking Nvidia’s stranglehold on the market. At the centre of this rivalry is a fundamental design debate: Should the country rely on the versatile graphics processing unit (GPU) or pivot to the highly specialised application-specific integrated circuit (ASIC)? The fight is no longer about finding a single Nvidia clone; it is about...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國對先進半導體的持續出口管制迫使中國的人工智慧（AI）晶片製造商努力建立自給自足的矽生態系統，以打破Nvidia在市場上的壟斷。這場競爭的核心在於設計理念的根本辯論：中國應該依賴多功能的圖形處理單元（GPU），還是轉向高度專用的應用特定積體電路（ASIC）。
briefing.background: 隨著美國加強對中國高科技產業的出口管制，特別是在半導體領域，中國面臨著迫切的需求來提升其自主研發能力。Nvidia作為全球領先的GPU供應商，對於AI應用的推動起到了關鍵作用，然而美國的政策限制了中國企業獲取這些技術的途徑。這使得中國的AI晶片產業不得不重新思考其發展路徑，尋求建立一個不依賴外部技術的生態系統，以應對未來的市場需求和技術挑戰。
briefing.analysis: 中國AI晶片製造商面臨的挑戰不僅是技術上的，更是戰略上的。選擇依賴GPU還是ASIC的辯論，反映了不同的市場需求和技術路線。GPU因其靈活性和多用途性，適合於廣泛的AI應用，而ASIC則能在特定任務上提供更高的效率和性能。這場競爭的結果將影響中國在全球半導體市場的地位及其技術自主性。隨著中國加大對本土技術的投資，未來可能會出現新的競爭者，挑戰Nvidia的市場主導地位，但這也需要時間和資源的積累。

politics.title: Colombia’s far-right presidential candidate De la Espriella wins first round of vote ahead of runoff
politics.summary: Lawyer and Trump admirer has risen rapidly in the polls and will face Iván Cepeda in election runoff in three weeks The far-right lawyer Abelardo de la Espriella won the first round of Colombia’s presidential election on Sunday and will face senator Iván Cepeda, the candidate backed by leftwing president Gustavo Petro, in the runoff. With 100% of ballots counted, the outsider and Donald Trump admirer De la Espriella secured 43.7% of the vote – just over 10.3m votes – compared with 40.9% (about 9.6m votes) for Cepeda, a philosopher and human rights activist who has served as a senator since 2014. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Lawyer and Trump admirer has risen rapidly in the polls and will face Iván Cepeda in election runoff in three weeks The far-right lawyer Abelardo de la Espriella won the first round of Colombia’s presidential election on Sunday and will face senator Iván Cepeda, the candidate backed by leftwing president Gustavo Petro, in the runoff. With 100% of ballots counted, the outsider and Donald Trump admirer De la Espriella secured 43.7% of the vote – just over 10.3m votes – compared with 40.9% (about 9.6m votes) for Cepeda, a philosopher and human rights activist who has served as a senator since 2014. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 哥倫比亞極右派總統候選人阿貝拉多·德拉埃斯普里耶拉在首輪投票中獲勝，獲得43.7%的選票，超過1030萬票，將於三週後的決選中對決由左派總統古斯塔沃·佩特羅支持的參議員伊萬·塞佩達，後者獲得40.9%的選票，約960萬票。
briefing.background: 哥倫比亞的政治環境在近年來經歷了顯著變化，左派與右派之間的對立愈發明顯。古斯塔沃·佩特羅於2022年當選總統，成為該國首位左派總統，推動社會改革及人權議題。然而，隨著經濟挑戰及社會不滿的加劇，極右派的聲音開始抬頭，德拉埃斯普里耶拉的崛起正是這一趨勢的體現。此次選舉的結果顯示出哥倫比亞選民在面對政治選擇時的分歧與緊張局勢。
stakeholders: 阿貝拉多·德拉埃斯普里耶拉
briefing.analysis: 德拉埃斯普里耶拉的勝利反映了哥倫比亞社會中對於傳統政治的不滿，尤其是在經濟困境及安全問題上。作為特朗普的擁護者，他的政策立場可能會吸引那些希望改變現狀的選民。另一方面，伊萬·塞佩達則代表了左派的持續努力，試圖推動社會正義及人權的議題。根據參考報導，這場選舉的緊張氛圍顯示出兩位候選人之間的競爭將會非常激烈，且可能影響未來的政策走向。隨著決選的臨近，兩位候選人的支持者及各種利益團體將會進一步加強其宣傳與動員，這將對哥倫比亞的政治局勢產生深遠影響。

supporting_titles: Tense election night in Colombia as country heads to presidential runoff
Colombia presidential runoff pits leftist senator against pro-Trump rival
supporting_summaries: Colombia’s election heads to a June 21 runoff after a tight first round between de la Espriella and Cepeda.
Left-wing senator Iván Cepeda will face Trump admirer Abelardo de la Espriella at the final ballot on 21 June.

politics.title: Netanyahu orders strikes on Beirut’s southern suburbs, clouding Iran mediation
politics.summary: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu ⁠ordered attacks on the Hezbollah-controlled southern suburbs of Beirut on Monday, signalling further escalation of a war that has complicated mediation towards resolving the US-Iran conflict. Iran’s foreign ministry spokesperson, Esmaeil Baghaei, said on Monday that Israeli attacks in Lebanon were among factors causing a delay to the diplomatic process to end the US-Iran war, reiterating that a Lebanon ceasefire was an integral part of any...

briefing.news_focus: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu ⁠ordered attacks on the Hezbollah-controlled southern suburbs of Beirut on Monday, signalling further escalation of a war that has complicated mediation towards resolving the US-Iran conflict. Iran’s foreign ministry spokesperson, Esmaeil Baghaei, said on Monday that Israeli attacks in Lebanon were among factors causing a delay to the diplomatic process to end the US-Iran war, reiterating that a Lebanon ceasefire was an integral part of any...

Iran’s foreign ministry spokesperson, Esmaeil Baghaei, said on Monday that Israeli attacks in Lebanon were among factors causing a delay to the diplomatic process to end the US-Iran war, reiterating that a Lebanon ceasefire was an integral part of any...
briefing.background: 這則消息反映安全局勢仍是國際政治的主軸之一。這類事件通常不只涉及軍事風險本身，也牽動外交回應、能源價格與盟友協調。
briefing.analysis: 這次角力重點不只是事件本身，而在各方如何控制升高風險、釋放威懾訊號，並避免局勢失控帶來更高政治與經濟成本。

supporting_titles: Israel PM orders strikes on Beirut suburbs as Hezbollah conflict escalates
Netanyahu orders Israeli bombing of southern Beirut
supporting_summaries: Benjamin Netanyahu says the Hezbollah stronghold of Dahieh will be targeted in response to attacks on Israeli civilians.

Thousands leave homes after Israeli military instructed to strike ‘terrorist targets’ in largest escalation of war since ceasefire • Middle East crisis – live updates Benjamin Netanyahu has instructed the Israeli military to bomb the southern suburbs of Beirut, the most serious escalation of Israel’s war in Lebanon since a supposed ceasefire was announced on 17 April. The Israeli prime minister and his defence minister, Israel Katz, said on Monday they had given instructions to strike “terrorist targets” in the southern suburbs for what they called “repeated and ongoing violations of the ceasefire by Hezbollah”. Continue reading...

politics.title: Why India is rolling out welcome mat for Myanmar’s Min Aung Hlaing
politics.summary: _ Myanmar leader Min Aung Hlaing’s first trip to India since being sworn in as president signals New Delhi’s recognition of the strongman’s political status as it seeks to counter mounting Chinese influence, according to analysts. The five-day visit, which began on Saturday at the personal invitation of Prime Minister Narendra Modi, is aimed at strengthening ties with one of Myanmar’s key regional partners. Despite Western sanctions imposed after the February 2021 coup, India has maintained...

briefing.news_focus: _ Myanmar leader Min Aung Hlaing’s first trip to India since being sworn in as president signals New Delhi’s recognition of the strongman’s political status as it seeks to counter mounting Chinese influence, according to analysts. The five-day visit, which began on Saturday at the personal invitation of Prime Minister Narendra Modi, is aimed at strengthening ties with one of Myanmar’s key regional partners. Despite Western sanctions imposed after the February 2021 coup, India has maintained...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 緬甸領導人敏昂萊首次訪問印度，標誌著新德里的政治認可，旨在加強與緬甸的關係，以對抗日益增長的中國影響力。此次為期五天的訪問是應印度總理莫迪的個人邀請，重點在於加強雙方的合作。
briefing.background: 自2021年2月政變以來，緬甸的政治局勢持續動盪，西方國家對敏昂萊政府實施了制裁。然而，印度在此背景下選擇與緬甸保持聯繫，這反映出其在地緣政治上的考量。印度希望通過加強與緬甸的合作，來鞏固自身在東南亞的影響力，特別是在中國日益擴張的情況下。這次會議的議題包括貿易、連接性、邊界安全及防務合作，顯示出雙方在多方面的合作潛力。
briefing.analysis: 此次會議中，莫迪與敏昂萊的會談涵蓋了多個重要議題，顯示出印度對緬甸的重視，尤其是在貿易和安全合作方面。參考報導指出，雙方在邊界安全及防務合作上有深入討論，這可能是印度在面對中國影響力擴張時的一種防範措施。不同於西方國家的制裁，印度選擇了更為務實的外交策略，強調經濟和安全合作的重要性。這一策略可能會引發國際社會對印度外交政策的不同解讀，特別是在如何平衡人權與地緣政治利益方面。

supporting_titles: PM Modi holds talks with Myanmar President Aung Hlaing
supporting_summaries: PM Narendra Modi held wide-ranging talks with Myanmar President Min Aung Hlaing, focusing on trade, connectivity, border security and defence cooperation

economy.title: ‘Where are the jobs?’: as US autoworkers face offshoring, Democrats vie to win votes
economy.summary: Workers who voted for Trump and Republicans in recent elections are now being hit with offshoring and the impacts of tariffs – but can Democrats sway them? Brenda Davis, a retiree who worked at Ford in Ohio for more than 20 years, was dismayed to learn that a new Buick she bought from General Motors was manufactured entirely in China . Foreign vehicles are strongly discouraged from parking lots at autoworkers’ facilities, as they serve as a reminder of the ongoing threat outsourcing poses to their livelihoods. Morgan Hughes, who currently works at the General Motors assembly plant in Springfield, Ohio, is worried about the impact tariffs have had on her plant’s dwindling workload and its recent sale to a different owner, as concerns over a plant closure have loomed over the factory for years. Continue reading...

Foreign vehicles are strongly discouraged from parking lots at autoworkers’ facilities, as they serve as a reminder of the ongoing threat outsourcing poses to their livelihoods. Morgan Hughes, who currently works at the General Motors assembly plant in Springfield, Ohio, is worried about the impact tariffs have had on her plant’s dwindling workload and its recent sale to a different owner, as concerns over a plant closure have loomed over the factory for years. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國的汽車工人面臨外包和關稅的影響，這使得曾經支持特朗普及共和黨的工人感到不安。布倫達·戴維斯，一位在福特工作超過20年的退休工人，對她新購的完全在中國製造的別克感到失望。汽車工廠的員工對外國車輛持強烈抵制態度，因為這提醒著他們外包對生計的威脅。摩根·休斯，現任通用汽車裝配廠的工人，擔心關稅對她工廠工作量的影響以及工廠最近被出售的情況，因為工廠關閉的擔憂已存在多年。
briefing.background: 美國汽車產業正面臨外包與關稅的雙重挑戰，這影響了工人的就業安全。隨著全球供應鏈的變化，許多汽車製造商選擇將生產轉移至成本較低的國家，如中國，這使得美國本土的製造業受到威脅。特朗普政府實施的關稅政策旨在保護美國工業，但同時也增加了生產成本，導致一些工廠工作量減少，甚至關閉。這一情況使得曾經支持共和黨的工人對民主黨的吸引力產生了疑問，尤其是在即將到來的選舉中。
briefing.analysis: 面對外包與關稅的挑戰，民主黨試圖爭取曾經支持特朗普的工人選票，但這並非易事。工人們對於外包的恐懼和對未來工作的不安，使得他們對於政治承諾的懷疑加深。參考報導指出，隨著新關稅政策的實施，企業可能會尋求在中國以外的地區設立生產基地，這可能會改變美國汽車產業的格局。不同報導的重點在於，主新聞強調工人的個人故事與情感，而參考報導則更關注整體產業趨勢及其對企業策略的影響。未來，若民主黨無法有效回應工人的擔憂，可能會失去這部分選民的支持。

supporting_titles: Who will win from Trump’s tariffs?
supporting_summaries: New rates mean new “China plus one” locations

economy.title: China index reshuffle to entrench tech trades and boost AI rally: brokerages
economy.summary: A semi-annual reshuffle of key gauges tracking China’s yuan-denominated stocks is set to boost the representation of technology companies, a move expected to lure more inflows and further increase the sector’s appeal, according to investment banks. The shake-up was projected to spur US$3.1 billion of inflows into tech hardware and semiconductor makers, according to Goldman Sachs. Domestic brokerages including Guosen Securities said the changes would inject more confidence into tech stocks,...

briefing.news_focus: A semi-annual reshuffle of key gauges tracking China’s yuan-denominated stocks is set to boost the representation of technology companies, a move expected to lure more inflows and further increase the sector’s appeal, according to investment banks. The shake-up was projected to spur US$3.1 billion of inflows into tech hardware and semiconductor makers, according to Goldman Sachs. Domestic brokerages including Guosen Securities said the changes would inject more confidence into tech stocks,...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國的主要指數將進行半年度重組，這次變動將增加科技公司的代表性，預計將吸引更多資金流入並進一步提升該行業的吸引力。根據高盛的預測，這次調整可能會為科技硬體和半導體製造商帶來31億美元的資金流入。國內券商如國信證券表示，這些變化將增強市場對科技股的信心。
briefing.background: 中國的科技行業近年來經歷了快速增長，特別是在人工智慧（AI）和半導體領域。政府的政策支持和市場需求的上升使得科技公司成為投資者關注的焦點。隨著全球對科技股的興趣增加，中國的指數重組被視為一個重要的市場動態，旨在提高科技公司的市場地位，並吸引國內外資金流入。這次重組的背景也與中國政府推動經濟轉型和創新有關，特別是在面對全球經濟不確定性時。
briefing.analysis: 此次指數重組將使科技公司在中國股市中的地位更加鞏固，這對於希望在AI和半導體領域獲得更大市場份額的企業來說是一個利好消息。根據高盛的預測，預計將有31億美元的資金流入這些行業，顯示出市場對科技股的強勁信心。國內券商如國信證券的評論也反映了這一點，認為重組將進一步增強投資者對科技股的信心。隨著資金流入的增加，這可能會促進科技公司的股價上漲，並吸引更多的外部投資者。然而，市場的反應也可能受到全球經濟狀況和政策變化的影響，因此未來的發展仍需密切關注。

economy.title: Oil and gas prices rise as US and Iran trade strikes; UK house prices fall – business live
economy.summary: British house prices fell 0.6% in May, leaving them 1.7% higher than a year earlier, Nationwide reports Eurozone factories were hit by the biggest jump in input costs in four years last month. The Iran war drove up the cost of raw materials and intermediate goods, according to the latest poll of purchasing managers at European manufacturers. Although euro area manufacturers reported an expansion for a fourth successive month in May, the sector is showing signs of struggling under the weight of rising prices and supply disruptions emanating from the war in the Middle East. “A key development in May was yet another surge in energy and raw material prices, causing the largest monthly jump in firms’ costs for four years. The incidence of supply chain delays has meanwhile risen to the highest since the pandemic supply squeeze of 2022, adding further upward pressure to prices. “Global turmoil is taking a toll on the property market. House prices fell between April and May and are up just 1.7% in a year. It’s a valuable reminder that property investments aren’t always safe as houses. “The Nationwide House Price Index only provides a partial picture of the market, but it’s particularly timely, because it looks at prices at the point of mortgage approvals – months ahead of the completion data we get from the Office for National Statistics. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國房價在5月份下降了0.6%，儘管與去年相比仍上升1.7%。同時，歐元區工廠面臨四年來最大的原材料成本上漲，主要受到伊朗戰爭影響，導致原材料和中間商品價格上升。儘管歐元區製造業連續第四個月報告增長，但因為價格上漲和供應鏈中斷，該行業顯示出疲軟的跡象。
briefing.background: 近期的伊朗戰爭對全球經濟造成了顯著影響，特別是在能源價格上漲方面。隨著原油和天然氣價格的上升，這不僅影響了生產成本，還對消費者的生活成本造成壓力。英國的房地產市場也受到影響，房價的下滑反映了市場對未來經濟不確定性的擔憂。歐元區的製造業雖然在增長，但面臨的成本壓力和供應鏈問題使得經濟前景變得更加複雜。
briefing.analysis: 各方利益關係在此事件中顯得尤為重要。首先，能源價格的上漲將直接影響家庭的生活成本，根據BBC的報導，家庭能源價格預計在七月上漲13%。這將使消費者面臨更大的經濟壓力，可能進一步影響消費支出。其次，雖然歐元區製造業報告增長，但面對成本上升和供應鏈延遲，企業可能會減少投資，進而影響經濟增長。根據《經濟學人》的報導，雖然希望伊朗戰爭不會導致經濟衰退，但能源價格的上漲仍將推高生活成本，這可能導致更廣泛的經濟問題。各方在應對這一挑戰時的策略將對未來的經濟走向產生深遠影響。

supporting_titles: How high could global inflation go?
How a rise in energy bills will affect you from July
supporting_summaries: With luck, the Iran war won’t cause a recession. But the surge in energy prices will push up the cost of living
Household energy prices will rise by 13% a year in July, as soaring wholesale costs caused by the US-Israel war with Iran hit bills for the first time.
